summary: Iteration 20: GPS Tracking Feature Tests - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs for Navixy config (GET/PUT /api/admin/my-agency/navixy) and tracker positions (GET /api/navixy/positions) working correctly. Frontend GPS tab (6th tab) visible and navigable, GPS page shows vehicle list with positions/speed/status, config modal opens with pre-filled Navixy URL and Hash fields.

gps_tab_visibility.details: GPS tab is the 5th tab (after Véhicules, before Clients) in the agency-app navigation bar. All 6 tabs are visible on desktop: Accueil, Réserver, Réservations, Véhicules, GPS, Clients.

gps_page_content.details: GPS page shows 'Suivi GPS' title with last refresh timestamp. Stats row shows En route (1), Stationnés (0), Hors ligne (25). Vehicle list shows 26 trackers with their labels, coordinates, speed, motor status (Éteint/Allumé), and last update time.

gps_tracker_status_indicators.details: Each vehicle card shows colored status badge: red 'Hors ligne' for offline, green for moving, yellow for parked. Status correctly reflects connection_status and movement_status from API.

navixy_config_modal.details: Config modal opens via gear icon button (data-testid='config-navixy-btn'). Shows 'Configuration Navixy' title, info text about navixy.com, URL API Navixy input (pre-filled with 'https://login.logitrak.fr/api-v2'), Hash API input (masked/secure), and 'Enregistrer' save button.

backend_get_navixy_config.details: GET /api/admin/my-agency/navixy returns agency's Navixy config with navixy_api_url, navixy_hash, and configured=true for Geneva agency.

backend_put_navixy_config.details: PUT /api/admin/my-agency/navixy successfully updates agency's Navixy config. Config persists correctly.

backend_get_positions.details: GET /api/navixy/positions returns list of 26 tracker positions with tracker_id, label, lat, lng, speed, heading, connection_status, movement_status, ignition, and last_update.

backend_auth_protection.details: All Navixy endpoints correctly reject unauthorized requests (401) and forbid client users (403). Only admin/super_admin roles can access.

tab_navigation_with_6_tabs.details: Tab navigation works correctly with all 6 tabs visible. Active tab shows underline indicator. GPS tab uses 'navigate' icon.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All GPS features visually verified and working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Geneva agency with Navixy config
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS tracking feature fully implemented and working: 1) GPS tab is 5th in agency-app layout (after Véhicules). 2) GPS page shows real-time tracker positions from Navixy API - 26 trackers for Geneva agency. 3) Config modal allows agency admin to update their own Navixy credentials. 4) Backend endpoints: GET/PUT /api/admin/my-agency/navixy for config, GET /api/navixy/positions for tracker list. 5) Authentication: admin/super_admin only, clients get 403. 6) Geneva agency has working Navixy config in DB: api_url=https://login.logitrak.fr/api-v2, hash=a6a4d4c91182f6971c805cc591fa9a7e.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All GPS tracking features working as specified.
